disagreements: Tests must protect Firebase, myTrips, and Offline Cache separately.
unsupportedAssumptions: A local factory alone prevents later callback writes.
missedRisks: Synthetic fixtures could be misreported as real Agent consensus.
questions: Are fixture labels enforced across every file?
revisedRecommendation: Approve the local-only boundary with explicit fixture labeling and three persistence regression areas.

evidence.claim: The Project OS records the Demo boundary.
